# elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord Daily Update (Apr 15, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development activity for April 15, 2026, focused on enhancing the security and reliability of the Discord plugin through a new pull request addressing default configurations, access control, and timeout handling.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*No completed work was recorded for this date.*

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
- [#48](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-discord/pull/48) fix(discord): safer defaults, DM allowlist gating, and generation timeout fallback: This PR introduces improved security defaults, implements gating for DM allowlists, and adds a fallback mechanism for generation timeouts.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*No issues were closed on this date.*

## NEW ISSUES
*No new issues were opened on this date.*

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*No active issues with more than 3 comments were identified.*
